headline: Mohawk Industries (MHK) Is Down 7.2% After Profit Beat But Soft Sales And Cautious Outlook
summary: In the past week, Mohawk Industries, Inc. reported first-quarter 2026 results showing net sales of US$2,728.7 million and net income of US$117.1 million, with earnings per share of US$1.90, while also filing an omnibus shelf registration to issue a range of securities including debt, common and preferred stock, and warrants. While profit growth, cost initiatives, and share repurchases pointed to improving fundamentals, investors focused on the revenue miss versus expectations and cautious...
